steps.title: Let's build an Open Ended slide!
steps.description: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words — no fixed choices, just real responses. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New presentation' to start a fresh deck.

steps.title: Pick the Open Ended slide type
steps.description: Select 'Open Ended' from the slide type picker. It captures free-text answers from your audience.

steps.title: Write your question
steps.description: Type your question here. Make it specific to spark a real response.

action.value: What's one thing you'd change about our team meetings?

steps.title: Choose how responses display
steps.description: Grid shows all responses at once; One by one reveals them individually. Click to switch layouts.

steps.title: Tune your settings
steps.description: Toggle Time limit, Hide results, or Allow images to suit your session. Then Preview to test it live.

mainInteractions.label: open preview via JS click (bypasses overlay backdrop)

steps.title: Audience types their answer here
steps.description: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly on your screen.

steps.title: Responses appear live
steps.description: Each answer pops up instantly. Hit Present to go live.
